server.name: quant-agentic-mcp
server.description: MCP server for quant-agentic-trading-core. Exposes ledger state, HMM market regime, and emergency circuit breaker.

tools.name: get_ledger_state
tools.description: Reads active positions, capital allocation, and available capital from the SQLite ledger.

tools.name: get_market_regime
tools.description: Queries the live HMM filter status, regime label, and Dissimilarity Index for OOD detection.

returns_json.description: Optional JSON-encoded array of recent returns for live inference

tools.name: emergency_circuit_breaker
tools.description: Instantly freezes or unfreezes all outbound trading operations. Action must be 'ENGAGE' or 'DISENGAGE'.

action.description: ENGAGE to freeze trading, DISENGAGE to resume

tools.name: get_friction_model
tools.description: Returns the current execution friction cost per contract used in backtest validation.

tools.name: lobstar_submit_signal
tools.description: Bridge for LOBSTAR semantic agent: accepts a parsed signal dict and routes it through typing validation before execution.

tools.name: get_circuit_breaker_status
tools.description: Returns whether the emergency circuit breaker is currently engaged.

tools.name: list_project_contexts
tools.description: Returns compact IDs and metadata for external project contexts. Use before loading full project docs.

category.description: Optional category filter, e.g. web_scraping, agent_framework, solana_arbitrage

tools.name: get_project_context
tools.description: Returns a compact context card for one external project by id, including intended use and guardrails.

project_id.description: Project context id, e.g. scrapling, praisonai, solana_jupiter_arbitrage_bot

tools.name: list_local_skill_contexts
tools.description: Returns compact local CI skill contexts and priority files for targeted analysis.

tools.name: list_ai_specialists
tools.description: Returns specialized AI roles for targeted low-token project improvement tasks.

task.description: Optional task filter, e.g. security, execution, provider

tools.name: get_ai_specialist
tools.description: Returns one AI specialist contract with priority files, provider policy, and output contract.

tools.name: get_ai_specialist_prompt_context
tools.description: Returns compact prompt context for a specialist. Use instead of loading whole-repo context.

tools.name: get_project_prompt_context
tools.description: Returns compact project context plus persistent memory for low-token prompts.

specialist_id.description: Optional specialist id, e.g. security_auditor or mcp_toolsmith.

component.description: Optional component filter for project memory.

tools.name: list_project_memory
tools.description: Lists compact persistent memory entries for this project.

tools.name: record_project_memory
tools.description: Records a compact project memory entry for future prompts. Do not store secrets or raw private data.

tools.name: get_ai_routing_policy
tools.description: Returns token-saving and safety policy for specialist routing.

tools.name: list_free_ai_provider_sources
tools.description: Returns configured public sources for legitimate free-tier/local AI provider discovery.

tools.name: get_llm_council_config
tools.description: Returns the local LLM Council configuration without exposing API keys.

tools.name: build_llm_council_plan
tools.description: Builds a dry-run LLM Council execution plan for a question. Does not call external LLMs.

tools.name: run_llm_council_query
tools.description: Runs the LLM Council through OpenRouter. Defaults to dry-run to prevent accidental external calls.

tools.name: get_mirofish_config
tools.description: Returns the local MiroFish-style swarm simulation configuration.

tools.name: build_mirofish_simulation_plan
tools.description: Builds a bounded MiroFish-style swarm simulation plan. Planning only; no external execution.

seed_materials_json.description: JSON array of seed material strings

tools.name: build_mirofish_trading_research_brief
tools.description: Builds a MiroFish-style trading research brief with project risk guardrails.
